author: nicholasjroy
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Generate linked concept notes from selected text in your vault.

manifest.author: NetworkGestalt
manifest.description: Generate linked concept notes from selected text in your vault.
manifest.name: Sage

name: Sage

releases.author: nicholasjroy
releases.description:
Public alpha.

Select text in a note, run "Explain selection", and Sage generates a linked concept note in your vault using the Anthropic API.

Requires Obsidian 1.11.4 or later and your own Anthropic API key. See the README for setup and settings.
releases.name: Sage 0.1.0
